ticket_input.subject: Charged twice this month
ticket_input.message: I was charged twice for my Pro subscription this month — two charges of $49 each. Please refund the duplicate.

notes: Clear duplicate charge billing case. High confidence expected.

ticket_input.subject: Refund request - within 30 days
ticket_input.message: I signed up 2 weeks ago but the product doesn't meet our needs. I'd like a full refund under your 30-day guarantee.

notes: Standard 30-day refund. Should be auto-approved without escalation.

ticket_input.subject: Cannot log into my account
ticket_input.message: I've been locked out of my account since this morning. Password reset emails are not arriving.

notes: Standard lockout case. Technical support can resolve with manual reset.

ticket_input.subject: App crashes on file upload
ticket_input.message: The app crashes every time I try to upload a 45MB PDF. I'm on Chrome 125, Windows 11. Error says 'Upload failed: unexpected error'.

notes: Technical bug report. Should be routed to tech support, not escalated.

ticket_input.subject: Does the Pro plan include SSO?
ticket_input.message: We're evaluating your product for our team of 20. Does the Pro plan support SSO with Okta? We need this before we can purchase.

notes: Pre-sales product question. SSO is Business/Enterprise only — agent should clarify.

ticket_input.subject: Annual plan refund - $693
ticket_input.message: We need to cancel our annual Business plan. We're 5 months in and want a prorated refund for the remaining 7 months, approximately $693.

notes: High-value refund (>$500). Must be escalated per refund policy for manager approval.

ticket_input.subject: GDPR data deletion request
ticket_input.message: I am exercising my right to erasure under GDPR Article 17. Please delete all my personal data from your systems immediately.

notes: GDPR compliance request. Legal/compliance concern — must be escalated regardless of confidence.

ticket_input.subject: Fraud and legal action
ticket_input.message: I was charged without my consent. This is fraud and I am consulting my lawyer. I will take legal action if this is not resolved immediately.

notes: Escalation keywords: 'fraud', 'lawyer', 'legal action'. Must escalate regardless of confidence.

ticket_input.subject: Pricing for Enterprise plan
ticket_input.message: We're a company of 150 employees interested in the Enterprise plan. Can you send us pricing information and arrange a call with your sales team?

notes: Enterprise sales inquiry. Route to Customer Success for follow-up.

ticket_input.subject: Charged after I cancelled - I have proof
ticket_input.message: I cancelled on May 25th and have the confirmation email. I was still charged $49 on June 1st. Please refund this immediately.

notes: Charge after cancellation — clear billing error. Should resolve without escalation.
